name: Curry Fried Chicken

source.cookbook: The Complete and Authentic Thai Curry Cookbook 2
source.author: Various

ingredients.item: large green bell pepper, cut into squares

method: In a large bowl, mix the soy sauce, chicken, sherry and cornstarch,
Heat 2 tbsp. of the oil and fry the vegetables and garlic for 5 minutes.
Stir in the broth and simmer, covered for about 4-5 minutes.
Transfer the vegetable mixture in a bowl and keep aside.
With a paper towel, wipe out the skillet.
Add the vegetable mixture and cook the chicken for about 2-3 minutes.
Serve with a garnishing of green onions.
Curry is traditionally found in Indian foods. It is technically a combination
of some spices, some of which change depending on the type of curry you
purchase. Add as much curry or as little as you like. This simple recipe has
